caption: A man with a light complexion, wearing glasses, a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and beige suspenders, sits in a recording studio. He is wearing large black headphones and a tall, grey, stylized wig that peaks upward. A black professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. He is speaking, with his mouth slightly open across the sequence. The background consists of a wall adorned with framed photographs and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. To his right, a black bag and white boxes are visible. Overlaid on the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" appearing in red and white and "PODCAST" in white below it. Throughout the frames, the man remains in a fixed position, with minimal movement as he continues to speak into the microphone.
